channel.title: libgomp on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in libgomp on William Fang

item.title: gcc 找不到 libgomp.spec: No such file or directory
item.description: error: can't find libgomp.spec 在网上找了好久的解决方法，其实是因为最近安装了新版本的 gcc，无法与旧版本的动态库链接。这里需要拷贝一份到 LD_LIBRARY_PATH 所在的路径 sudo cp /home/william/Documents/Linux-Tools/gcc/gcc9/gcc-9.2.0/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libgomp/libgomp.spec /usr/lib sudo cp /home/william/Documents/Linux-Tools/gcc/gcc9/gcc-9.2.0/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libgomp/libgomp.spec
